name: Dak's Green Grocers' Oat Bran Bread (Bread Machine)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Better for Bread white flour
recipeInstructions:
1. If you have a juicer, juice the cucumber (with skin on), spinach leaves and parsley. Add enough water to make 1 1/4 to 1 1/3 cups.
2. If you don't have a juicer, place the cucumber, spinach and parsley in a blender with 1 cup boiling water and liquefy. Then add enough water to make 1 1/4 to 1 1/3 cups.
3. Add all the ingredients into the bread machine pan in the order listed. Set the lightness control to far left. Select "Oat/French" setting and press Start.
